name: adv-stale-cache-collision
notes: A same-size source revert under coarse mtime resolution MUST NOT reproduce evidence from a prior source state. getStatus() returns 500, then 404, then 500 again -- all three bodies are byte-size-identical, and preserveMtime freezes src.ts's mtime across the flips so a naive mtime+size cache would serve stale bytecode. Run C (reverted to 500) must report 500, matching run A: compare(A,C) is still_fail_unchanged (identical tree, identical evidence), while compare(A,B) is updated_fail. If a stale transform cache existed, C would echo B's 404 and compare(A,C) would wrongly be updated_fail. The vitest adapter declares no neutralization; this fixture arbitrates that declaration.
